summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PayPal recurring subscriptions feature for Olivo Cards. All backend APIs working correctly (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI properly displays PayPal sync status, recurring payment messages, and subscribe buttons.
passed_tests: GET /api/plans returns plans with paypal_plan_id field
POST /api/admin/paypal/sync-all-plans syncs paid plans with PayPal
POST /api/subscriptions/paypal/create creates PayPal subscription with approval URL
Admin Plans page shows 'Sincronizado' badge for synced plans (Profesional, Empresarial)
Admin Plans page shows 'Sincronizar con PayPal' button
Subscription page shows 'Pago recurrente' message when selecting paid plan
Subscription page shows 'Suscribirse con PayPal' button for recurring payments
context_for_next_testing_agent: PayPal recurring subscriptions feature is complete. Plans 'Profesional' and 'Empresarial' are synced with PayPal sandbox. The integration creates real PayPal subscriptions that redirect users to PayPal for approval. Test user testpaypal@test.com can be used for testing subscription flows.
